note: Excluded from the research dataset only. All remain fully supported in the ClockJumper converter at clockjumper.com. No time-zone regime is lost by any omission; regime completeness is guaranteed by the third inclusion gate.

framework_omissions.reason: Not classified Alpha, Beta, or Gamma in GaWC 2024 (most sit in GaWC's Sufficiency tiers, which GaWC defines as not dependent on the world-city network). GaWC measures advanced-producer-services connectivity, which excludes several national capitals; its 2024 edition also reflects the withdrawal of global services firms from Russia.

tourism_omissions.reason: Appear in historical Euromonitor Top 100 editions but are not verifiable in Euromonitor's publicly-released 2025 index (the full current index is proprietary).
